holdings.infoBox: PJFM is an equity ETF with a total of 47 individual holdings. The top holdings are NiSource stock at 4.88%, WESCO International at 4.63%, Markel Group at 4.07%, Lattice Semiconductor at 3.99%, and Gaming and Leisure Properties at 3.95%.

overview.description: The PGIM Jennison Focused Mid-Cap ETF (PJFM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is active, investing primarily in global mid-cap companies. The fund aims for capital appreciation. PJFM was launched on Dec 11, 2023 and is issued by PGIM.
